failures.where_diff: Header element screenshot differs from stored baseline in closed mobile state.
failures.note: Could be intentional improvement after geometry normalization or regression; baseline is untrusted.

failures.where_diff: Header + opened mobile menu visual state differs from baseline.
failures.note: No baseline update allowed without explicit product signoff.

failures.where_diff: Expected 1280x53, received 1280x57; geometry/pixel diff on desktop closed header.
failures.note: Header height token increased (52->56), so diff is expected technically, but still needs product signoff.

failures.test: desktop Sklep open: header + megamenu snapshot
failures.where_diff: Expected 1280x53, received 1280x57 with pixel diff in open megamenu state.
failures.note: Open-state geometry changed; must be accepted by product verifier before any baseline update.

decision_rule: Until owner/product signoff exists for target UI state, all four failures remain non-acceptable and block product_accept.
